case_title: NOWROCKI, MATT VS WHITNEY, DARIN PHILIP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY NOWROCKI, MATT AS TO DEFENDANT WHITNEY, DARIN PHILIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2006 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT, NOTICE SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-11-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-19-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANTS CHALLENGE TO VENUE DENIED. CLERK TO SET TRIAL DATE FOR HEARING ON THE MERITS FOR 1/19/07 AT 3:30 P.M. TO BE HEARD WITH 817920.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLFT MATT NOWROCKI FILED ONLY.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM MATT NOWROCKI, FILED. INQUIRY RE DISPOSITION OF CASE.
REQUEST FROM JAMES WHITNEY TO CONTINUE 1/19/07 HEARING DATE-FWD TO DEPT. 506-DAY OF HEARING. (NO FEE SUBMITTED).
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-19-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-02-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT ORDERED TO APPEAR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITNEY, DARIN PHILIP DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DARIN PHILIP WHITNEY. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH A BASIS FOR PERSONAL LIABILITY FOR THE NAMED DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF MAY PROCEED WITH HIS CLAIM TO ADD THE CORPORATE DEFENDANT AND PROCEED WITH HIS CLAIM ON THAT BASIS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE DATED 3/6/07 RECEIVED FROM MATT NAWROCKI, FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO PLTF, NOWROCKI, MATT.
